allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; lines=[l.strip\(\) for l in sys.stdin if l.strip\(\)]; [print\(json.dumps\(json.loads\(l\), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\) for l in lines[-3:]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(json.dumps\(json.loads\(l\), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\) for l in sys.stdin if l.strip\(\)]")
